home.description: Experience authentic Vietnamese cuisine with elegant ambiance and dedicated service
home.footerDescription: Experience authentic Vietnamese cuisine with elegant ambiance and dedicated service. We are committed to bringing you the highest quality dishes.

featured.title: Our Menu
featured.subtitle: Discover signature dishes crafted daily from fresh ingredients
featured.empty: No dishes are available in this category

items.text: The dishes were served quickly, plated beautifully, and balanced in flavor. The dinner atmosphere was excellent.
The staff were wonderful and arranged our table very quickly. My family was very satisfied.
A great place for team meetups with a comfortable sound level and very tasty grilled dishes.

whyUs.subtitle: Service quality
whyUs.title: What We Always Deliver
items: Vietnamese flavors with a modern touch
A warm atmosphere with refined design

items.title: Weekend offers
items.desc: Save 20% for groups of 6 guests or more.

items.title: Happy hours
items.desc: Special combo menu from 14:00 to 17:00 every day.

items.title: Private space
items.desc: Private room for 8-12 guests with a customized menu.

contact.subtitle: Contact and map
contact.title: Visit Us Today
contact.mapDescription: Find the nearest branch in one click and get directions instantly.
contact.phoneFallback: Please update the restaurant phone number

items.question: How can I reserve a table?
items.answer: You can fill out the quick reservation form at the top of this page or call our hotline directly.

items.question: Do you support group reservations?
items.answer: Yes. We recommend booking 1-2 days in advance so we can prepare the space and menu options.

items.question: Is parking available?
items.answer: Yes. Both motorbike and car parking are available near the main entrance.

items.question: What are your opening hours?
items.answer: We are open daily from {{openingTime}} to {{closingTime}}.

auth.otpSent: OTP code has been sent to your email

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Discover the story and passion behind our restaurant

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Our restaurant was founded with a passion for bringing memorable dining experiences to every guest. From the very beginning, we committed to using the freshest, highest-quality ingredients to create delicious dishes.
story.paragraph2: With a dedicated team of chefs and professional service staff, we always strive to give every guest lasting memories through each meal.

items.title: Mission
items.text: Deliver high-quality meals with excellent service, bringing joy and satisfaction to every customer.

items.title: Vision
items.text: Become a leading restaurant that people love and trust, a place they always want to return to.

items.title: Core Values
items.text: Quality, dedication, originality, and sustainability are the values we always pursue.

items.title: Fresh Ingredients
items.text: We only use fresh, high-quality ingredients from trusted suppliers.

items.title: Passionate Chefs
items.text: Our experienced chefs are passionate about cooking and creating unique dishes.

items.title: Excellent Service
items.text: Our professional and dedicated staff are always ready to help you.

items.title: Reasonable Prices
items.text: We provide the best value for your money without ever compromising on quality.

items.title: Award Winning
items.text: Recognized with many prestigious culinary awards and honors.

items.title: Convenient Location
items.text: Located centrally, easy to reach, and with sufficient parking available.

team.title: Our Team
team.intro: Our team includes dedicated professionals in culinary arts and customer service.

members.title: Head Chef
members.text: 20+ years of cooking experience, specializing in traditional Vietnamese cuisine

members.title: Restaurant Manager
members.text: Ensures every restaurant operation runs smoothly and professionally

members.title: Service Specialist
members.text: A caring service team always ready to serve you with a smile
